address: 1580 Neo Landings Loop, Unit 216, Kissimmee, FL 34744
title: Aston Square- Cozy one Bedroom Luxury Apartment
description:
Discover Luxurious Living in the Heart of Historic Downtown Kissimmee, FL

Welcome to Aston Square Luxury Apartments, the newest upscale community designed to elevate your lifestyle. Our cozy one-bedroom luxury apartment offers a perfect blend of modern elegance and comfort, ensuring an unparalleled living experience.

This thoughtfully designed apartment features a resort-style pool, stylish vinyl plank flooring, stainless steel appliances, spacious walk-in custom closets, keyless entry, and an expansive sun deck for outdoor relaxation.

Residents can enjoy top-floor amenities, including a media lounge with a rooftop deck, a dedicated co-working space, package lockers, and electric vehicle charging stations. The 24/7 state-of-the-art fitness center allows you to stay active, while the private business lounge with work pods provides a productive environment.

Inside, the modern kitchen boasts quartz countertops and kitchen islands, while the spa-inspired bathroom includes soaking tubs. Smart thermostats ensure personalized climate control, and screened-in patios add an extra layer of comfort. Oversized storage units are also available to accommodate your belongings.

Ideally located near Walt Disney World, The Loop Town Center, and major highways, Aston Square by Kimaya offers seamless access to premier entertainment, shopping, and dining destinations.






 
 
 Rental Terms 
 
 Rent: $1,450 




 Application Fee: $99 

 Security Deposit: $500 


 Available Now

address: 1580 Neo Landings Loop, Unit 313, Kissimmee, FL 34744
title: Aston Square- Spacious One Bedroom Luxury Apartment
description:
Welcome to our exquisite one-bedroom luxury apartment in Kissimmee, FL. Spanning 892 square feet, this spacious residence features elegant vinyl plank flooring, sleek stainless steel appliances, a stylish kitchen island, and stunning quartz countertops.

As you step into this brand-new apartment, you'll be greeted by a chef-inspired kitchen that seamlessly flows into the open living and dining area, creating the perfect space for entertaining or unwinding.

Down the hall, you'll find a versatile den—ideal for a home office or additional storage—before arriving at the serene owner’s suite. Here, you can relax in the luxurious soaking tub and enjoy the convenience of a spacious walk-in custom closet.

Stay effortlessly connected with modern features such as an interactive thermostat and keyless entry.

Step outside to enjoy your private screened-in patio or unwind on the expansive sun deck.

Indulge in resort-style amenities, including a sparkling pool, a 24/7 state-of-the-art fitness center, and an exclusive top-floor media lounge with an outdoor rooftop deck.

For productivity and convenience, take advantage of the business lounge with private work pods, collaborative co-working spaces, secure package lockers, oversized storage units, and electric vehicle charging stations.

Experience the pinnacle of luxury living in this beautifully designed apartment.

Contact us today to join our tour!




 
 
 Rental Terms 
 
 Rent: $1,825 




 Application Fee: $99 

 Security Deposit: $500 


 Available 6/10/26

description:
Experience Luxury Living in Kissimmee, FL

Step into elegance with our spacious 1,132 sq. ft. 2-Bedroom, 2-Bathroom Apartment at Aston Square Luxury Apartments. Designed to complement your lifestyle, this stunning residence offers a perfect blend of modern sophistication and everyday comfort.

Featuring sleek vinyl plank flooring, top-of-the-line stainless steel appliances, spacious walk-in custom closets, keyless entry, and quartz countertops, this apartment is as stylish as it is functional.
